caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a wooden podium, delivering a speech in an indoor setting. He is wearing a light-colored long-sleeved shirt paired with a matching Nehru jacket. Behind him is a textured, dark green stone wall with a stepped geometric design. To his right, a tall, cylindrical gold-colored vase holds pink flowers. Two microphones are positioned on the podium in front of him. Throughout the sequence, Modi uses various hand gestures to emphasize his points; he begins by raising both hands with palms open, then lowers them, momentarily clasps his hands together, and finally raises his right index finger in a pointing motion. His facial expression remains focused as he speaks, and the camera angle remains steady, capturing him from the waist up against the consistent backdrop.
